w:r.w:t: Defense Investigation Work Product · Prepared under Attorney Supervision
[2–3 sentence summary of who this person is, why they matter to this case, and your overall assessment of their reliability as a witness. This is the first thing Chuck reads. Make it count.]
Selected: [Circle or highlight above] · Assessed by: [Name] · Date: [DATE]
[Does this witness have a reason to be untruthful? Relationship to prosecution, pending charges, deals offered, personal animus?]
[Prior convictions for fraud, perjury, theft, or other crimes of moral turpitude on record?]
[Financial relationship with state? Romantic or family ties to victim or prosecution witness?]
[Have they changed their story between initial statement, preliminary hearing, and deposition?]
[Anything found in public records, social media, or database research that bears on credibility?]
Every documented statement from this witness, in chronological order. Source type noted per entry. Flags mark entries with cross-reference potential.
[Summary of what they said in initial police interview — paraphrased, not quoted]
[Summary of preliminary hearing testimony — note any differences from initial statement]
⛑ New detail not in prior statements
[Any informal statement, social media post, or communication that bears on case]
Specific conflicts between what this witness said at different times or across different sources. Each row is a usable cross-examination point.
"[Exact or paraphrased claim from source A]" · [Source, date]
[Why this matters to the defense narrative]
[Phone records / social media showing otherwise] · [Source D]
Recommended angles for cross. Each row gives Chuck the angle, the evidentiary basis, and the document to confront the witness with. Not legal strategy — analytical input for Chuck to use or discard.
Confront prior inconsistent statement re: location
Witness stated [X] to police but testified [Y] at prelim. Direct conflict on material fact.
Police report p.4 · Prelim transcript p.12
Phone records show [frequency/pattern] of contact inconsistent with claimed relationship.
Witness has pending [charge / matter] that may have influenced cooperation with state.
Contradict claim of no prior contact with co-witness
Facebook data shows mutual connections and interactions prior to incident.
What still needs to be done on this witness before trial. Drives the next work cycle.
[FOIA request pending — describe what was requested and when]
[Additional OSINT to run — platform, search target, purpose]
[Phone records for date range not yet obtained]
[Witness to witness connection not yet confirmed — method to pursue]
Every source referenced in this report. Chain of custody for the intelligence in this document.
[OSINT source — platform, search method, URL if applicable]
[Your field research, database query, or investigative finding]

This report was prepared under the supervision of the attorney of record and constitutes attorney work product. All findings are sourced as indicated. Facts and assessments are distinguished throughout. This report does not constitute legal advice.
